summary: Iteration 38 frontend testing completed successfully. All requested changes verified: Landing desktop nav converted from dropdowns to direct links (See It In Action, Appeal Statistics, Legal Resources, Success Stories, FAQ, About); Appeal Statistics access-crisis content is now expanded by default (no dropdown); Section headings centered on Appeal Statistics and How It Works pages; Mobile nav still contains all important routes; No regressions on navigation links.

LandingPage.jsx lines 88-118: Mobile menu retains comprehensive navigation including FAQ, Forms, How It Works, Legal Framework, About, Contact
